infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Easy Drive uses your location to show nearby vehicles and help with pickup navigation.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Easy Drive needs camera access to photograph vehicles for listings and inspections.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Easy Drive needs photo library access to upload vehicle photos and insurance documents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Easy Drive uses location to show nearby vehicles.
